instruction: Enable a strict quiet mode: disable notification banners and disable lock-screen notifications. Then create ~/Desktop/dnd_status.txt with two lines exactly: show-banners=false and show-in-lock-screen=false.

parameters.command: gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners true; gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-in-lock-screen true; rm -f ~/Desktop/dnd_status.txt

result.command:
b=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-banners 2>/dev/null); l=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.notifications show-in-lock-screen 2>/dev/null); ok=1; [ "$b" = "false" ] || ok=0; [ "$l" = "false" ] || ok=0; expected=$(cat <<'EOF'
show-banners=false
show-in-lock-screen=false
EOF
); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/dnd_status.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
